title: Venezuelan Semolina Empanadas
description: Crispy fried empanadas filled with semolina and beef, perfect for a snack or meal, and made with fodmap friendly ingredients to accommodate dietary needs.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine semolina, ground beef, onion, eggs, salt, and pepper, and mix well until just combined.
Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions and shape each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Carefully place 2-3 empanadas in the hot oil and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the empanadas from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining empanadas.
Serve the empanadas hot and enjoy.
